# Tradeflow

Tradeflow is an AI-powered lead generation platform for home service businesses — HVAC and plumbing companies across the United States. We provide managed Google Local Services Ads, missed-call text-back automation, SMS follow-up sequences, call tracking, and a private lead dashboard so no inbound lead is ever lost. We also offer a tech-services line for home service businesses: custom websites, AI automation, custom software, and CRM setup.

## Key links

- https://www.tradeflow-technologies.com/ — Marketing homepage: features, pricing, FAQ, and tech services.
- https://www.tradeflow-technologies.com/get-started — Start a free trial (2 weeks free, $200 in ad spend on us, no contracts).
- https://www.tradeflow-technologies.com/privacy — Privacy policy.
- https://www.tradeflow-technologies.com/terms — Terms of service.

Contact: hello@tradeflow-technologies.com
